onClick:
{{
JSObjectInvoice1.saveInvoiceWithItems() 

  Tabs1.selectedTab !== "New Invoice" ? (
		
	storeValue("selectedDocumentType", "INVOICE") ,
		 storeValue("viewMode", "list"),

storeValue("isAdding", false),

    invoice_no.setValue(""),
    SelectPartner.setSelectedOption(""),
    SelectWarehouse.setValue()(""),
    SelectPayment.setSelectedOption(""),
    SubtotalInput.setText(""),
    TaxAmountInput.setText(""),
    DiscountAmountInput.setText(""),
    TotalAmountInput.setText(""),
 SelectPayment.setSelectedOption(""),
    InvoiceNoteInput.setValue(""),
    resetWidget("InvoiceDateInput", true),
    resetWidget("DueDateInput", true),
    resetWidget("InvoiceItemsGrid", true)
  ) : null

storeValue("documentPrintAction", "print_" + Date.now())

DocumentPrintActions.openInvoicePrint()

}}
